layout.howToBroadcast: How to ask for a part
layout.fullscreenUnsupported: Fullscreen is not supported in this browser. Use Add to Home Screen for the best mobile view.
layout.fullscreenFailed: Fullscreen request failed. Tap the button again.

roomChangeConfirm.title: Switch market?
roomChangeConfirm.beforeBody: Your hotline will reconnect in the new market. Finish any active call first.

roomChangeHelp.title: Switching markets
roomChangeHelp.body: You are currently in {{room}}. The market controls which yards hear you and which yards you hear.
roomChangeHelp.point1Text: Use the market name under your company to move between available Hotline HQ markets.
roomChangeHelp.point2Text: After you choose a market, the line reconnects you in that market automatically.
roomChangeHelp.point3Text: When you ask for a part, only yards in your current market hear it.

extensionHelp.title: Direct Numbers
extensionHelp.body: Direct numbers are short 3-digit numbers for private yard-to-yard calls inside Hotline HQ.
extensionHelp.point1Text: Request a direct number first. Once approved, the yard directory unlocks for your account.
extensionHelp.point2Text: Search by company, person, market, or number, then press Call when they are available.
extensionHelp.point3Text: Your direct number works while you are logged in and connected to the Hotline HQ line.

broadcastHelp.title: Need a part?
broadcastHelp.body: Unmute, speak your request to the room, then mute again. Other yards in this market can answer live.
broadcastHelp.notConnected: The talk button appears after the line connects.

profileModal.title: Complete your profile
profileModal.body: Add any details you want. You can skip this and update it later in Account Settings.

listenOnly.title: Listening Only
listenOnly.subtitle: Mic is off — you can hear but not talk
listenOnly.subtitleShort: Mic is off — tap to enable
listenOnly.step1: Click the lock icon in your browser's address bar (top left)
listenOnly.step1Short: 1. Tap the lock icon in the address bar

offer.text: Get a free website for your yard

yealinkLost.title: Desk phone disconnected
yealinkLost.body: Your desk phone dropped off the hotline. Take over from this browser, or wait for the desk phone to reconnect.
yealinkLost.note: While you wait you are off the hotline and will not hear calls. Taking over connects you right away — you can switch back when the desk phone returns.
yealinkLost.tookOver: You are connected from the browser

yealinkBack.title: Your desk phone is back online
yealinkBack.body: You are on the browser right now. Switch back to your desk phone, or keep talking from here.
yealinkBack.released: Call moved to your desk phone
yealinkBack.note: Switching hands the call to the desk phone. Staying keeps the call in this browser — you can switch later from Settings.

conference.referralBody: Invite a yard and save 10% — share your link in <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink>
conference.title: Hotline
conference.muteShortcutHint: Tap <kbd>Space</kbd> to talk · hold it to push-to-talk
conference.autoConnectHint: Your phone will connect you automatically
conference.noOneSpeaking: Line is quiet — when someone needs a part you have, that's money in your pocket
conference.usersInRoomMuted: {{count}} yard on the line, ready to buy
conference.usersInRoomMuted_other: {{count}} yards on the line, ready to buy
conference.nudgeAlone: More yards on the line = more parts sold. Invite a yard buddy — you both save 10%.
conference.nudgeNoExtension: Without a direct number, yards can't call you back to buy. You're missing sales.
conference.nudgeFirstLogin: Good morning! {{count}} yard already on the {{room}} line — parts are moving.
conference.nudgeFirstLogin_other: Good morning! {{count}} yards already on the {{room}} line — parts are moving.
conference.nudgeNobodyOnline: You're the first one on. When yards start calling in, you'll be first to answer and make the sale.
conference.nudgeBusyRoom: {{count}} yards in {{room}} right now — lots of parts moving, stay sharp!
conference.nudgeShareText: Join me on Hotline HQ — more yards means more parts sold. We both save 10%!

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.getExtensionHint: Get a 3-digit direct number to call other yards privately
extensions.requestReceivedBody: We're reviewing your request for <mono>*{{ext}}</mono>. You'll get access to the yard directory once it's assigned.
extensions.ctaBody: When a yard finds your part, they need a way to call you back. Get your number so you never miss a sale.
extensions.dialogBody: Choose a 3-digit number. Other yards will dial this to call you privately.
extensions.lockedHint: Request a direct number to unlock the yard directory

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.callDevice: Where do you want to talk?
settings.callDeviceBody: Pick whether you talk from your desk phone or this browser.
settings.webTakeOverSub: Switch on to move the call from your desk phone to this browser.
settings.yealinkReleaseSub: You are talking from this browser right now. Switch off to go back to your desk phone.
settings.notificationsBody: Don't miss a sale — get notified when someone's looking for a part, even when you're away from your desk.
settings.notificationsEnabled: Notifications turned on for this device.
settings.notificationsDisabled: Notifications turned off for this device.
settings.noDevices: No devices set up — enable notifications first.
settings.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad, first add Hotline HQ to your Home Screen (Share → "Add to Home Screen"), then open it from there to turn on notifications.
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support notifications.
settings.pushBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Allow them for this site in your browser settings, then reload.
settings.enableNotifications: Turn on notifications for this device
settings.requestNewRoomBody: Want to add a new city or market?
settings.roomRequestSubmitted: Request submitted. We will be in touch!
settings.referYardBody: Every yard you bring in is another buyer for your parts — plus you save 10% on your bill.
settings.noReferrals: No referrals yet. Every yard you invite is a potential buyer for your parts.
settings.gestureBody: Use your camera to mute and unmute without touching the screen.
settings.gestureHandInSub: Hold your hand in front of the camera to go live
settings.gestureHandAwaySub: Move your hand away to mute automatically
settings.gesturePrivacy: Camera only turns on during a live call. Video stays on your device — nothing is sent anywhere.

requestRoom.title: Request a New Market
requestRoom.subtitle: Want to add a new city or market? Submit a request and we'll set it up.

broadcastPanel.totalTitle: Total parts requests from your market
broadcastPanel.noBroadcastsHint: When someone needs a part, it shows up here. If you have it — that's a sale.
broadcastPanel.answeredTitle: Another yard responded to this request
broadcastPanel.unansweredTitle: Nobody answered yet — call them if you have it, easy sale
broadcastPanel.listeningTitle: Yards on the line when this request went out
broadcastPanel.partPipeTitle: Part request — Year | Make | Model | Part | Specification
broadcastPanel.participantsTitle: Yards that were part of this conversation
broadcastPanel.broadcasterRoleTitle: The yard that asked for the part
broadcastPanel.speaker: Asked
broadcastPanel.responseTimeTitle: How fast the first yard answered

members.title: Yard Directory
members.subtitle: Every yard in the network and how to reach them
